lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in good condition. It shows minor signs of wear on the interior and exterior from regular use. All major mechanical systems are functioning properly, and the car has been well-maintained.
Mint condition.

The car is in good condition. The exterior has some minor surface scratches but no major dents. The interior is well-maintained with light wear. All mechanical systems are fully functional and have been regularly serviced.

Calling all DIY enthusiasts! This vehicle is the ultimate project car, offering a fantastic opportunity for someone looking to roll up their sleeves and bring a classic back to its former glory. While it currently requires significant mechanical and cosmetic attention, it’s a budget-friendly way to start your next automotive adventure!

This vehicle is in absolute mint condition, looking and driving as if it just left the showroom. The exterior paint is flawless, without a single scratch or chip, and the interior is pristine with no signs of wear. Every mechanical component, from the engine to the smallest electronic feature, functions perfectly. It has been meticulously maintained with a full service history and kept in a climate-controlled garage. This is an exceptional example of this model, ideal for a collector or a buyer who demands perfection.

This vehicle is in absolute mint condition, truly a showroom-quality find for the discerning collector or enthusiast. The exterior paint retains its original factory luster, with zero imperfections, scratches, or dings, having been meticulously garage-kept its entire life. Inside, the cabin is equally pristine; the leather upholstery shows no signs of wear, the carpets are spotless, and every electronic component functions exactly as it did the day it left the assembly line. Mechanically, the car is flawless, accompanied by a comprehensive service history and recent inspections that confirm its peak performance. This is a rare opportunity to own a vehicle that looks and drives as if it were brand new.

We are pleased to present this exceptionally maintained vehicle, representing a premier choice for the discerning driver. This unit exhibits a refined balance of mechanical reliability and aesthetic appeal, having been preserved to a standard that ensures immediate road-readiness. With its sophisticated profile and proven performance capabilities, this vehicle offers a distinguished driving experience and remains an outstanding value proposition within its class.

Hi there! I'm selling my trusty car and it’s been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid condition and has plenty of life left in it—perfect for commuting or weekend getaways! I’ve taken great care of it, and I’m sure you’re going to love it as much as I have. Let’s get you behind the wheel for a test drive!

This E46 M3 is powered by the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six, featuring six individual throttle bodies and dual-VANOS variable valve timing for a linear power delivery up to its 8,000 RPM redline. Power is sent to the rear wheels via a Getrag 6-speed manual transmission and a variable M differential lock. The chassis remains sharp and communicative, having undergone proactive subframe reinforcement and a recent valve adjustment to ensure peak mechanical tolerance. Suspension components maintain factory-spec damping, providing excellent lateral stability and turn-in response. Recently serviced with a cooling system refresh, this example represents a mechanically sound driver’s car for the purist seeking an analog connection to the road.
Used vehicle in good condition. Reliable engine. Clean interior. Minor exterior scuffs. Title in hand. Priced for quick sale.

This vehicle has been meticulously maintained and remains in impressive condition both inside and out. The exterior retains a deep shine with only the minor, expected signs of careful road use, while the interior remains smoke-free and exceptionally clean. All electronic features, from the infotainment system to the climate control, function perfectly. Mechanically, the car is sound, having received regular oil changes and scheduled maintenance, ensuring a smooth and responsive driving experience. It sits on a set of high-quality tires with plenty of tread remaining. This is a reliable, well-cared-for example that is ready for its next owner to enjoy immediately without any needed repairs.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a superior balance of performance and value. Having undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection, it exhibits consistent mechanical reliability and a well-preserved aesthetic. A distinguished choice for the discerning driver seeking a dependable, high-caliber automobile with a documented history of care.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents an exceptional opportunity for the discerning driver. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a refined aesthetic, it offers a balanced synthesis of performance and reliability. Fully inspected and prepared for immediate delivery, this motorcar stands as a testament to conscientious ownership and enduring value.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty car, and it’s looking for a new adventure! It’s in really solid shape and has been super reliable for all my daily errands and weekend getaways. It drives beautifully and has been well-loved, so you know you're getting a great ride. Come take it for a spin—you’re going to love how it handles!

Offered is a mechanically sound E46 M3 featuring the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six power plant. This unit delivers linear power delivery through its six individual throttle bodies and is paired with a crisp 6-speed Getrag manual transmission. The chassis remains composed with a factory-spec limited-slip differential providing excellent lateral grip and corner-exit traction. Recent preventative maintenance includes a comprehensive VANOS overhaul and subframe inspection. The suspension geometry is dialed, retaining the communicative feedback these M-cars are known for. While the exterior shows honest road wear consistent with its mileage, the drivetrain remains robust and eager for the redline. A driver-focused example ready
Used car. Good condition. Regular maintenance performed. Reliable runner. Clean title.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between luxury and daily reliability. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine, showing only minor cosmetic wear consistent with careful ownership. Inside, the cabin remains a sanctuary; the premium upholstery is supple and free of major blemishes, while all electronic features and climate controls function exactly as intended. Mechanically, the car is robust—the engine idles smoothly, and the transmission provides crisp, seamless shifts. It has been serviced regularly with a comprehensive record of preventative maintenance, ensuring it is ready for its next long-distance journey. This is a solid, dependable example of the model that offers a premium driving experience and long-term peace of mind for its next owner.

This expertly maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, this model offers a refined driving experience supported by a history of diligent care. Every aspect of this automobile has been vetted to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for performance and presentation, offering exceptional value in its class.

We are pleased to present this exceptionally well-maintained vehicle, which exemplifies a harmonious balance of mechanical integrity and refined aesthetics. Rigorously inspected to ensure it meets our exacting standards, this unit offers a dependable and sophisticated driving experience. Its condition reflects a commitment to consistent care, providing the discerning buyer with a premier automotive asset that delivers both performance and lasting value.

Hey there! Thanks so much for stopping by to check out my car! 🚗 It’s been such a reliable ride for me and is still in really solid shape. It drives super smoothly and has been well-loved over the years. Whether you're just commuting to work or planning a fun weekend road trip, this beauty is totally ready for its next adventure! I'm happy to answer any questions you have—I'd really love to see it go to a great new home!
This E46 M3 is a purist’s specification, powered by the high-revving S54 3.2L
Used car in good condition. Clean title. Regularly serviced. Runs well.

Experience the perfect balance of performance and practicality with this well-maintained executive sedan. The exterior, finished in a timeless Obsidian Black, retains a deep shine and shows only the minor, expected signs of careful road use. Step inside to find a clean, smoke-free cabin featuring charcoal leather seating that remains supple and comfortable for long journeys. All interior electronics, including the navigation system and premium audio, are fully operational. Under the hood, the vehicle has been serviced strictly according to the manufacturer's schedule, ensuring the engine and transmission operate with smooth, reliable precision. The suspension is firm yet forgiving, and the tires provide excellent grip with significant tread remaining. This car represents a fantastic opportunity for a buyer seeking a dependable, high-quality vehicle that is ready to drive home today.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies consistent care and mechanical integrity. This unit has undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our exacting standards for both performance and aesthetics. Ideal for the discerning driver seeking a balance of luxury and proven reliability, this vehicle represents a premier acquisition in its class, offered in turn-key condition for immediate delivery.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents an exceptional balance of performance and reliability. Featuring a refined interior and a robust powertrain, it has been thoroughly inspected to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for quality and roadworthiness. A sophisticated choice for the discerning driver seeking value without compromise.

Hey there! I’m selling my reliable ride that has been so good to me over the years. It’s in great shape and runs like a dream—perfect for your daily commute or weekend adventures! I've taken really good care of it, and I'm sure you're going to love driving it as much as I have. It's ready for its next home, so feel free to reach out if you have any questions!

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54 inline-six, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies. It remains mechanically sound with recent VANOS servicing and a subframe reinforcement kit already installed—a critical preventative measure for this chassis. The Getrag 6-speed manual transmission provides crisp engagement, paired with a factory limited-slip differential for optimal power delivery. While the exterior shows minor patina consistent with its age, the suspension geometry remains tight, utilizing refreshed bushings and Bilstein dampers. A driver-focused example that prioritizes mechanical integrity and analog feedback.
Used vehicle. Good condition. Runs well. Clean interior. Maintenance up to date.

This well-maintained luxury sedan offers a refined driving experience and has been cared for with attention to detail. The exterior paint retains a deep, lustrous shine, though it shows minor, expected road wear such as small stone chips on the front fascia. Inside, the cabin remains a comfortable sanctuary; the premium leather upholstery is clean and supple, showing only light natural creasing on the driver’s seat bolster. Mechanically, the vehicle is in strong health, with a smooth-shifting transmission and a responsive engine that has benefited from regular oil changes and scheduled maintenance. The suspension is firm yet compliant, and the braking system was recently serviced for peak performance. All onboard electronics, from the premium audio system to the dual-zone climate control, are fully operational. This car represents a fantastic opportunity for a buyer seeking a reliable, high-end vehicle that looks and drives beautifully.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies consistent care and mechanical integrity. This unit offers a refined driving experience, balancing robust performance with aesthetic appeal. Thoroughly inspected to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for safety and reliability, it represents an exceptional acquisition for the discerning driver seeking quality and longevity.
